---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
format:
  html: default
  pdf: default
---

![](images/PP.jpg){fig-align="center"}

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Middle East Technical University (METU), Turkey, 2017 - 2023.
-   M.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2025 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Employements

1.  Enerjisa Retail, Customer Operations Specialist, August 2023 - February 2026

2.  Türk Traktör, Production Development Assistant, October 2022 - July 2023

3.  Arvato Bertelsmann SCS, Systems Design Project Member, September 2022 - July 2023

## Internships

1.  ITC, Digital Transformation Intern, Summer 2022

2.  BVN Air, Production Intern, Summer 2022

# Projects

1.  Opera: Developed an ML algorithm for case classification (KNN & SVM, 90%+ accuracy).
2.  CaseGO: Led a team to automate case categorization and handing using LLM, NLP and RPA.
3.  Optima: Partnering on the project of optimizing “Unlicensed Producer” processes from start to finish.
4.  Optima: Leading on the project of creating a decision-making algorithm to sort the work data.
5.  Ideathon: Submitted a ML algorithm to improve HR’s talent improvement program. (Finalist)
6.  NAR: Submitted a supervised artificial intelligence algorithm and a mathematical model to optimize electrical charging stations’ locations. (4^th^ Place)

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python, Excel, Power Applications, VBA, SAS, SQL

# Certifications

1.  IELTS 8.0 Overall Score
2.  TOEFL ibt 97 Overall Score
3.  CPR (First Aid Certification)
